title: Mixed Baby Greens with Fennel, Oranges, and Caramelized Onions
ingredients: 1 jumbo sweet yellow onion, thinly sliced
1 bulb fresh fennel, outer part and tougher fronds removed, thinly sliced
2 large navel oranges, skinned and sliced into thin circles
instructions: In medium skillet, saute onion in butter on low heat until golden and caramelized, about 20 minutes. Place greens, fennel, oranges, pecans, and feta cheese in a bowl. Toss gently. Combine all ingredients for dressing in small bowl or container. Mix well. Drizzle most of dressing over greens. Toss gently. Top with caramelized onions. Drizzle remaining dressing as needed. Place pansy garnished on top of salad. Serves 6.
If you want to omit the onions, I suggest adding avocado to recipe.
